prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 郑州大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年升至第44名（2025年第50名、2024年第50名），排名持续上升，学校综合实力和认可度稳步提升；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面， 主要涉及学校管理回应类事件，对报考心理影响有限；抖音热度总排名第8（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高；2022年曾出现安徽投档线跌至一本线的断档事件， 但2023年后已恢复正常。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续 高热，与郑州大学工科专业设置匹配度高；安徽省2026年普通高考总人数约45.1万，较2025年（约46.2万）略有减少，物理类估算约31.4万人，竞争压力基本持平；郑州大学位于河南省郑州市，与安徽省地理相邻，交通便利，地域接受度高；该校在安徽省招生规模较大（物理类200+人），属于在皖 招生较多的省外211之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次28159、2026年扩招5.4%使竞争加剧、软科排名上升至44名提升学校吸引力、抖音高热增加报考热度等因素，考虑软科排名上升和考生总数略减的正面影响后小幅回调；预测2026年物理类最低位次约28874名，区间28374–29374名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 15732 → 93608 (anomalous drop in 2022) → 28029 → 28661 → 28159. Excluding the 2022 anomaly, rankings from 2023 to 2025 stabilized within the 28000–28600 range, with a fluctuation of about ±500 in the past three years, and a 2025 baseline of approximately 28159. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui: 180 in 2021, 182 in 2022, 196 in 2023, 190 in 2024, 203 in 2025, and 214 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 11 students (+5.4%), with three consecutive years of expansion, slightly broadening the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it rose to 44th (50th in 2025, 50th in 2024), with continuously improving rankings and steadily enhancing comprehensive strength and recognition. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving school management response incidents, with limited impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 8th overall (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms and relatively high application attention. In 2022, there was an anomalous event where the admission cutoff in Anhui dropped to the first-tier line, but it has returned to normal since 2023.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly popular in society, aligning well with Zhengzhou University's engineering offerings. The total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Anhui in 2026 is approximately 451,000, slightly down from about 462,000 in 2025, with an estimated 314,000 in Physics Category, keeping competitive pressure roughly unchanged. Zhengzhou University is located in Zhengzhou, Henan Province, adjacent to Anhui Province with convenient transportation and high regional acceptance. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Anhui (200+ in Physics Category), making it one of the more enrolled out-of-province 211 universities in Anhui.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 28159, a 5.4% enrollment expansion in 2026 intensifying competition, a rise in Soft Science ranking to 44th enhancing university appeal, and high Douyin heat increasing application enthusiasm, a slight downward adjustment is made after factoring in the positive impacts of the ranking rise and slight decrease in total examinees. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking for Physics Category is approximately 28874, with a range of 28374–29374.

Rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<28374) can prioritize reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; rankings near the upper bound (>29374) should primarily rely on Tier 3 safety majors.
